slides.title: Control the *weight*
slides.body: If you swing it, you're not training the muscle.

slides.title: Slow the *negative*
slides.body: Lower under control. That is where growth lives.

slides.title: Full range of *motion*
slides.body: Half reps with big plates build half results.

slides.title: Go *lighter*
slides.body: Drop the weight, feel the muscle, grow more.

slides.title: Form before *load*
slides.body: Earn the heavy weight with clean reps.

slides.title: Train with *intent*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your training and protein on track.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
